gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一部用笑声包裹泪水的隔空恋曲，值得为这份意外的温柔驻足。
gems.whyWatchEn: A heartwarming cross-distance romance built on mistaken voicemails, blending humor and grief into a genuinely unique love story.
gems.audience: 喜欢温暖治愈系爱情故事、不介意略带伤感基调的观众，尤其是对‘错位缘分’设定感兴趣的影迷。
gems.audienceEn: Viewers who enjoy warm, healing romantic stories with a bittersweet touch, especially those intrigued by 'misplaced fate' narratives.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 经典IP勇敢直面数字时代，但创新力度有限，更像一次安全的怀旧之旅。
gems.whyWatchEn: A safe but charming nostalgia trip that tackles digital-age themes, though it lacks the daring originality of earlier entries.
gems.audience: 系列老粉、家庭观众，以及想带孩子感受‘玩具总动员’情怀的家长。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of the franchise, family audiences, and parents wanting to share Toy Story nostalgia with their children.
